runners.formComment: Comes off a (18.77) win last time, scoring by 0.8 lengths in a Grade 3/4 over 330m at this track. Box stats strong with four wins and two placings from nine starts. Looks a leading chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Comes off a (18.77) win last time, scoring by 0.8 lengths in a Grade 3/4 over 330m at this track. Box stats strong with four wins and two placings from nine starts. Looks a leading chance.

runners.formComment: Backs up after finishing 7th on April 10 over 350m at Goulburn in a Grade 5. Would be better placed in something easier.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Backs up after finishing 7th on April 10 over 350m at Goulburn in a Grade 5. Would be better placed in something easier.

runners.formComment: Improved sharply when third behind Talakai at this track last start over 330m (19.57). Likely to play a major role.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Improved sharply when third behind Talakai at this track last start over 330m (19.57). Likely to play a major role.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted wide on the home turn and collided and lost ground.

runners.formComment: Missed the frame latest (18.99) when fifth over 330m at this track in a Mix 1/2/3. Goes very well off the draw boasting four wins and four places from 10 starts. Expected to go close.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame latest (18.99) when fifth over 330m at this track in a Mix 1/2/3. Goes very well off the draw boasting four wins and four places from 10 starts. Expected to go close.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Crowded for room in the turn and checked off.

runners.formComment: Finished off last campaign with a fourth (18.83) in a MX 1/2/3 at Wagga. Makes return after a four months break. Has a win and two minors when resuming. Others make more appeal.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished off last campaign with a fourth (18.83) in a MX 1/2/3 at Wagga. Makes return after a four months break. Has a win and two minors when resuming. Others make more appeal.

runners.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 1.5 lengths over 320m at Wagga in a handy (18.65), beating Latch On. Must be a winning chance again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort to win last start by 1.5 lengths over 320m at Wagga in a handy (18.65), beating Latch On. Must be a winning chance again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Was hampered by contact in the turn to the home straight.

runners.formComment: Was among the placegetters latest at this track when a 1.5 lengths third but did clock a speedy 18.88 over the 330m journey. Place prospects appear best again.
